systemStatus.headline: Thu Apr 30 4 AM run — running EARLY (before Toast/Sling AM emails). Yelp bonus $900 EXPIRES TODAY. Toast Apr 28 DPS still HTML-only.
systemStatus.detail: (1) 4 AM run is too early — Toast DPS for Apr 29 typically arrives ~7:38 AM PT, Sling daily for Apr 30 ~7:01 AM PT. Neither delivered yet. Most recent: Toast Apr 28 group summary (HTML-only, unparseable) + Sling Apr 29 schedule. Last fully-parsed Toast = Sat Apr 25 ($5,479.75 net / 192 guests / 20.8% labor). (2) Sling Apr 29: 8 staff, 37.16 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered, 2 off (carrying forward — Apr 30 not yet delivered). (3) Google Ads: 2 report emails in last 24h (Brewhouse Daily Campaign Report + Campaign performance) — no disapprovals. Last LIVE scrape Apr 28: 5,623 impressions, 69 clicks, $27.92 cost. (4) Yelp Ads: Bonus $900 fully exhausted, EXPIRES TODAY (Apr 30). (5) TripAdvisor: 1 marketing email (Travelers' Choice awards) — no analytics report in last 24h. (6) GitHub PAT: 200 OK. (7) Reviews: no new in last 24h; K Vos 4★ now 6 days unanswered.
